eip: 7621

title: Basket Token

description: Collateralized, tokenized funds with adjustable weights and reserves and minting/burning of LP tokens.

discussions-to: https://ethereum-magicians.org/t/proposal-for-a-new-eip-erc-the-erc-bts-basket-token-standard/18598

status: Draft

type: Standards Track

category: ERC

created: 2024-02-11

requires: 20, 721

---

## Abstract

The Basket Token Standard (BTS) allows for the implementation of multi-asset tokenized funds. This standard provides basic functionality for anyone to deploy unique, non-fungible BTS tokens that can contain an unlimited number of underlying [ERC-20](./eip-20.md) tokens.

The deployer receives a BTS token representative of their ownership of the fund, as well as liquidity provider (LP) tokens representative of their percentage share of the fund (100% at time of deployment but changing as other wallets contribute/withdraw). Whenever a contribution is made to a BTS, BTS LP tokens are minted and distributed to the contributor’s wallet (representative of their share of the fund); when a withdrawal is made from a BTS, the BTS LP tokens are burned and funds returned to the withdrawer’s wallet.

The BTS has a rebalance function which allows for a BTS owner to change the percentage share of the fund that each underlying token makes up. Tokens can be removed entirely or added through this function after a BTS has already been minted.

By leveraging the [ERC-721](./eip-721.md) standard as a representative token of ownership when minting the BTS, the tokenized fund can also be fully manageable and transferable on-chain.


Mint BTS

ERC-7621

Builds upon the principles of earlier standards, offering a unique proposition: the ability to create and manage baskets of tokens through a single contract.

Artificial Intelligence BTS

Constant updates

Find data ranging from contribution activity and marketplace listings to latest acquisitions and performance. You now have the ability to find the basket perfect for you, or better yet, create your own.

Personalize your BTS as you wish

You can use any ERC20 token and your own brand logo during the BTS creation.

Automatic Monthly Rebalance

On

Off

Corners

Discretionary

DAO-Controlled

Token

Construct and Launch

With Alvara's BTS Factory, you can design and launch your own ERC-7621 Basket Tokens (BTS) and begin earning management fees based on total AUM.

Verified Ownership

Using the ERC-721 standard as a building block, the ERC-7621 provides basket managers with access to management rights and revenue streams. Fully transferable, the BTS itself can be sold, allowing managers to sell their business.

Competitive Leaderboard

Battle for top positions on Alvara's leaderboard alongside other basket managers and institutions. Track the strategies of the most profitable BTS managers to mitigate your risk appetite in the crypto markets.

Yield Optimisation

Every BTS contains 100% collateralized underlying assets. These assets are utilized in yield generation strategies via our partners, with the rewards being fed back into the fund and distributed to share holders as dividends.

First Mover Advantage

Alvara has first-mover advantage, building the very first ERC-7621 hub with BTS Factory and management portal. Bringing tokenized baskets to DeFi like never before.

Low Cost

Underlying tokens are bought and sold via the Uniswap V2 Router, simplifying and streamlining the processes of creation, contribution and withdrawal.

Integrations

Basket Token Standard: The ERC-7621

Create customizable token baskets with ERC-20 assets.

FAQs

Questions?
We've got answers.

Gain clarity and insight as we provide comprehensive answers to your questions.

Telegram

What is the Alvara Protocol?

The Alvara Protocol is a transformative platform in the DeFi space designed to democratize the world of asset management. Built on the newly developed ERC-7621 token standard, Alvara provides an innovative tokenized basket factory that paves the way for anyone to become a basket manager. This unique ecosystem maintains complete transparency, allowing other investors to confidently contribute to the basket. Alvara adds a whole new subsector to decentralized finance by revolutionizing how we perceive and engage with basket management as both managers and investors.

What is a BTS token & how can I mint one?

What is the utility of my BTS token?

Can I redeem my funds at any time?
